title: Appointment of Chairperson in the Appellate under section 22A of CA, CS, CWA Act.
description: Appointment of Chairperson in the Appellate under section 22A of CA, CS, CWA Act.
text: 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [Part II—Sec. 3(i)] MINISTRY OF CORPORATE AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 17th November, 2016 G.S.R. 1074 (E). —In exercise of the powers conferred by sub section (I) of section 10B of the Cost and Works Accountants Act, 1959 (23 of 1959) and in pursuance of rule 3 of the Cost and Works Accountants (Election Tribunal) Rules, 2006, the Central Government hereby makes the following further amendments in the notification of the Ministry of Corporate Affairs notification number G.S.R. 787(E) dated the 151'1 October, 2015 published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-Section (i) dated the 15lh October, 2015, namely:- 2. In the said notification, in item (i), for the words “Additional Secretary”, the words “Law Secretary” shall be substituted. [F. No. 2/4/2015-PI] K. V. R. MURTY, Jt. Secy. Note:- The principal notification was published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part-II, Section 3, Sub-Section (i) vide G.S.R. No. 787(E) dated 15lh October, 2015 and subsequently amended vide notification numbers G.S.R. No. 857(E) dated 16th November, 2015, G.S.R. No. 498(E) dated ll,h May, 2016 and G.S.R. 922(E) dated 28th September, 2016. Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-1 10064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. ALOK KUMAR Digitally signed by ALOK KUMAR Date: 2016.11.18 11:58:40 +O5'3O' -- 1 of 1 --
